sections.paragraph:
or אָשׁוּר only with suff. אֲּשׁוּרֹו; pl. אֲשׁוּרִים f. ( Psa 44:19).

(1) a step, Pro 14:15. Metaph. steps are said to follow the footprints of God ( Job 23:11), and, on the other hand, to totter ( Psa 37:31), to slide ( Psa 73:2), in reference to virtue and religion; compare צַעַד.

(2) i.q. תְּאַשּׁוּר a kind of cedar [“Arab. Sherbîn”]. Eze 27:6, קַרְשֵׁךְ עָשׂוּ־שֵׁן בַּת־אֲשׁוּרִים “they have made thy deck (or benches) of ivory, the daughter of [“Sherbîn”] cedars,” i.e. inlaid in cedar; compare Virg. Æn. x. 136.
